cookbooks.title: Getting Started with @betterdb/semantic-cache
cookbooks.lead: Install the first Valkey-native semantic cache. Connect, store a response, and serve the next semantically similar prompt from cache - no LLM call needed.

cookbooks.title: LangChain & Vercel AI Adapters
cookbooks.lead: Drop semantic caching into LangChain or the Vercel AI SDK with one import. No check/store loops - the adapter handles hit/miss transparently.

cookbooks.title: Production Patterns
cookbooks.lead: Threshold tuning, uncertain hit strategies, per-category overrides, TTL management, invalidation, and built-in Prometheus metrics.
